main.description: Create an invite for a space. Caller must be the space owner. Returns the raw token once; only the hash is stored.

kind.description: join: redeem to become a member. read: bearer-only read access, no membership. read-join: anonymous read + signed-in redeem to join.

expiresAt.description: Unix ms timestamp. Omit for no expiry.

maxUses.description: Caps join redemptions only — read-token reads are unlimited. Omit for unlimited joins.

token.description: Raw token. Shown once — cannot be retrieved later.
